title: Tokens, Source Spans, Document Trees, Invariants, and Traversal · Program Brief: Parse Phases
summary: The parser concatenates HTML strings immediately, loses source locations, uses one mutable node class for every construct, and cannot report which input caused invalid nesting. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the parse phases increment in typed source-mapped document tree. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case prac…
objectives: Distinguish scanning, tokenization, block parsing, inline parsing, tree construction, transformation, validation, and rendering.
Represent dates, time zones, draft state, language tags, translations, authors, and stable IDs without locale ambiguity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-document-ast-4
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-document-ast-4.
# Case 1655: an accessibility-led community newsroom release.
# Operating constraint: reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval.
# Changed case: delete a source and change a shared layout, then compare incremental and clean artifact digests.
def worked_static_site_document_ast_4(tokens: int = 18, nodes: int = 15, source_spans: int = 15, invalid_edges: int = 0, max_depth: int = 5) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "readerworked4",
        "source1655",
        "parse4dekrow",
        "routeworked41655",
        "artifact1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if tokens < 1 or nodes < 1:
        return False, nodes, "tree-shape"
    if source_spans != nodes:
        return False, source_spans, "span-coverage"
    if invalid_edges > 0:
        return False, invalid_edges, "tree-invariant"
    if max_depth < 1 or max_depth > 64:
        return False, max_depth, "depth-budget"
    assert source_spans == nodes
    return True, nodes, "source-mapped-tree"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic pure-Python static-site decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected source, parse, route, render, asset, accessibility, cache, deployment, or recovery case, then state which filesystem, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validator, browser, GitHub, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

# Evidence: ssg-parse-phases-1xe5ce
# Competency: ssg-parse-phases.
# Case 8522: a large technical reference incremental rebuild.
# Operating constraint: keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native filesystem, template engine, validator, network, GitHub, DNS, TLS, CDN, and host effects.
# Changed case: replace a trusted author fixture with untrusted raw HTML, unsafe URLs, and an active SVG.
def evidence_ssg_parse_phases_1xe5ce(tokens: int = 18, nodes: int = 15, source_spans: int = 15, invalid_edges: int = 0, max_depth: int = 5) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:

    evidence_axes_1xe5ce = (
        "reader1xe5ce",
        "source8522",
        "parseec5ex1",
        "route1xe5ce8522",
        "artifact85221xe5ce",
        "recoveryec5ex18522",

    if source_spans != nodes:

    if invalid_edges > 0:
        return False, invalid_edges, "tree-invariant"
    if max_depth < 1 or max_depth > 64:
        return False, max_depth, "depth-budget"
    assert source_spans == nodes
    return True, nodes, "source-mapped-tree"

steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Parse Phases: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory publishing team handles case 1806 during an offline-first field documentation build. Build deterministic Python evidence to construct a source-mapped acyclic document tree under a depth budget; retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish scanning, tokenization, block parsing, inline parsing, tree construction, transformation, validation, and rendering.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Parse Phases model · Theory Parse Phases.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Parse Phases model · Theory Parse Phases, keep Parse Phases connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Distinguish scanning, tokenization, block parsing, inline parsing, tree construction, transformation, validation, and rendering.

hints: For Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Parse Phases model · Theory Parse Phases, name the reader, content authority, revision, source, span, parser, trust, route, render, asset, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery boundary, Parse Phases precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Parse Phases model · Theory Parse Phases, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, tokenization, parsing, transformation, routing, rendering, validation, publication, failure, rollback, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory publishing team handles case 1806 during an offline-first field documentation build. Build deterministic Python evidence to construct a source-mapped acyclic document tree under a depth budget; retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish scanning, tokenization, block parsing, inline parsing, tree construction, transformation, validation, and rendering.

For Static-site publishing and Python Defend the Parse Phases model · Theory Parse Phases, challenge the documented misconception with changed-source, delimiter, Unicode, nesting, route, URL, asset, viewport, cache, security, deployment, recovery, and controlled production-transfer evidence: Parsing Markdown is a sequence of regular-expression replacements.

checks.description: The cumulative python portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker # Evidence: ssg-parse-phases-1xe5ce.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: ssg-parse-phases-1xe5ce(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_ssg_parse_phases_1xe5ce\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?tokens < 1 or nodes < 1)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?source_spans != nodes)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?invalid_edges > 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?max_depth < 1 or max_depth > 64)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
